channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Woman Faces Backlash for Allergy Announcement Request on Flight, Says Negative Comments ‘Motivate’ Her to ‘Keep Educating’ (Exclusive)
item.description: “When people say things like, my allergies are ‘fake,’ it honestly just reinforces why I do this work in the first place,” Mia Silverman tells PEOPLE

item.title: Runner Becs Gentry Shares How She ‘Balances’ Motherhood, Supporting Her Partner and Ultra Marathon Training (Exclusive)
item.description: "There is no equilibrium really when it comes to these things," the Peloton instructor and Global Ambassador for HOKA tells PEOPLE

item.title: Backstreet Boys' Pre-Show Ritual Has Changed Over the Years, Now They Stretch and 'Pray' They Don't Get Hurt (Exclusive)
item.description: The Backstreet Boys admit they aren't the same band they were 30 years ago

item.title: Jennifer Aniston Put a Fresh Spin on This Jennifer Lopez-Worn Denim Trend During a Date Night in N.Y.C.
item.description: Give your denim collection a refresh with similar pairs from $24

item.title: Kate Hudson Radiates Glam at a Pre-BAFTA Party in London, Plus Lily Allen, Patrick Dempsey and More
item.description: From L.A. to London, and everywhere in between, see what your favorite stars are up to

item.title: Celebrity Scramble -- Guess The Tequila-Sippin' Hottie
item.description: It's National Margarita Day, so we're serving up a Hollywood hottie who knows her tequila. Toss back these clues and see if you can spit out the celeb...

item.title: Snowboard and Ski Apparel for Powder Days
item.description: TMZ may collect a share of sales or other compensation from links on this page. It's that time of the year -- the powder's fresh, the morning air feel...

item.title: Sexy Stars Sippin' Margaritas for National Margarita Day
item.description: If the February cold is getting you down, it might be time to follow the example of these stars ... and mix yourself a marg on National Margarita Day!...

item.title: Master P Says Colleges Are Blowing Up His Phone To Run Their Basketball Program
item.description: President of Basketball Ops today … head coach tomorrow? Master P isn’t ruling it out. The rap mogul-turned-basketball exec swung by the TMZ Sports st...

item.title: Rihanna Good Genes or Good Docs?!
item.description: Rihanna's looks over the years shine bright like a diamond 💎! Here is a 17-year-old version of the Barbados singer at Jay-Z's "The Teen People Listeni...
